# Claim Boundary Review Template

## May Claim After Review

- 模板包已建立
- 可按 release evidence package 填充试点材料
- 可追溯到现有功能回归、部署和专项预检证据

## Must Not Claim Until Filled And Signed

- 通过第三方测试
- 完成用户盖章验收
- 达到 10 x 100Gbps 或 512Mpps
- 达到 95% 检出率和 5% 误报率
- 生产安全或 HA 已验收通过

## Current Boundary

This bootstrap does not change any blocked formal gate. It only packages the review path.
